meta.name: Bella's Bistro
meta.description: Italian restaurant in Austin, TX — built by Shipyard AI
meta.author: Shipyard AI

settings.title: Bella's Bistro
settings.tagline: Handmade Italian in the heart of Austin

content.headline: Handmade Italian in the heart of Austin
content.subheadline: From nonna's kitchen to yours. Fresh pasta made daily, wood-fired pizzas, and a wine list that tells a story. Dinner served Tuesday through Sunday.

content.headline: Why people love Bella's
content.subheadline: Simple ingredients. Real technique. Every dish made with intention.

features.title: Fresh Pasta Daily
features.description: Our pasta is made in-house every morning. Tagliatelle, pappardelle, ravioli — rolled by hand, cut to order.

features.title: Wood-Fired Pizza
features.description: Our imported Stefano Ferrara oven runs at 900°F. Neapolitan-style pies with a 60-second bake.

features.title: Family Style Available
features.description: Hosting a group? Our family-style menu feeds the whole table. Just show up hungry.

features.title: Curated Wine List
features.description: Over 40 Italian wines by the bottle. Our sommelier picks a new 'wine of the week' every Tuesday.

features.title: Private Events
features.description: Our back room seats 24. Perfect for birthdays, rehearsal dinners, and corporate gatherings.

features.title: Seasonal Specials
features.description: The menu changes with what's fresh. Our farmers market haul dictates the specials board.

testimonials.quote: The cacio e pepe alone is worth the drive from San Antonio. This is the real deal.
testimonials.author: James K.

testimonials.quote: We've had our anniversary dinner here three years running. The osso buco is unforgettable.
testimonials.author: Maria & Tony R.

testimonials.quote: Best Italian in Austin, hands down. The burrata appetizer changed my life.
testimonials.author: Priya S.

items.question: Do you take reservations?
items.answer: Yes! We recommend reserving for Friday and Saturday evenings. Walk-ins are welcome Tuesday through Thursday and for Sunday brunch. Book online or call us at (512) 555-0142.

items.question: Do you accommodate dietary restrictions?
items.answer: Absolutely. We have gluten-free pasta options, and many of our dishes are naturally vegetarian. Let your server know about any allergies — our kitchen takes them seriously.

items.question: Is there parking?
items.answer: We have a small lot behind the restaurant (enter from 3rd Street). Street parking is also available on South Congress. Valet is offered Friday and Saturday evenings.

items.question: Do you cater?
items.answer: Yes — we offer catering for groups of 20 or more. Contact us at catering@bellasbistro.com for a custom menu and quote.

content.headline: Our Menu
content.subheadline: Seasonal Italian fare. Everything made fresh, in-house, with ingredients we're proud of.

plans.name: Antipasti
features: Arancini — crispy risotto balls with marinara

plans.name: Pasta & Entrées
features: Branzino al forno — whole roasted sea bass

items.question: Does the menu change?
items.answer: Our core dishes are always available, but we add seasonal specials based on what's fresh at the farmers market. The specials board changes weekly.

items.question: Can you accommodate large groups?
items.answer: Yes — for parties of 8 or more, we offer a family-style prix fixe menu at $55 per person. Includes antipasti, two pasta courses, an entrée, and dessert.

items.question: Do you have a kids menu?
items.answer: We offer kid-sized portions of our pasta dishes for $12. Buttered noodles are always available for the little ones.

content.headline: Reserve a table
content.subheadline: Walk-ins welcome Tuesday–Thursday. Reservations recommended for Friday, Saturday, and Sunday brunch. Call (512) 555-0142 or book below.
